Class User

java.lang.Object
application.User
public class User extends Object
The User class represents a user entity in the system. It contains the user's details such as userName, password, role, and other attributes.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(String userName, String password, String role)
      Constructor for minimal user creation
      Parameters:
      userName - String to set userName to.
      password - String to set password to.
      role - String of the user role.

    • User

      public User(String userName, String role, String email, String firstname, String lastname, int weight, boolean reviewerApplicant, String userFavorites)
      Constructor for user list creation.
      Parameters:
      userName - String to set userName to.
      role - String of the user role.
      email - String to set email to.
      weight - int representing user privilege weight.
      reviewerApplicant - boolean representing if the user has a pending reviewer application.
      firstName - String to set firstName to.
      lastName - String to set lastName to.

    • User

      public User(String userName, String email, String password, String role, String firstName, String lastName, String middleInitial, int weight)
      Constructor for full user creation.
      Parameters:
      userName - String to set userName to.
      email - String to set email to.
      password - String to set password to.
      role - String of the user role.
      firstName - String to set firstName to.
      lastName - String to set lastName to.
      middleInitial - String to set middleInitial to.
      weight - int representing user privilege weight.

    • getUserName

      public String getUserName()
      Gets the user's userName.
      Returns:
      userName

      Sets the user's userName.
      Parameters:
      userName - String of what to set userName to.

      Gets the user's password.

      Sets the user's password.

      password - String of what to set password to.

      public String getRole()
      Gets the user's role.
      Returns:
      role

    • setRole

      public void setRole(String role)
      Sets the user's role.
      Parameters:
      role - String of what to set role to.

    • setPrivileges

      public void setPrivileges(int privileges)
      Sets the user's privileges.
      Parameters:
      privileges - int representing user privilege weight.

    • getPrivileges

      public int getPrivileges()
      Get the weight of the users permissions from the 'role' description.
      Returns:
      int representing user privilege weight.

    • getFirstName

      public String getFirstName()
      Gets the user's first name.
      Returns:
      firstName

    • setFirstName

      public void setFirstName(String firstName)
      Sets the user's first name.
      Parameters:
      firstName - String of what to set firstName to.

      public String getLastName()
      Gets the user's last name.
      Returns:
      lastName

      public void setLastName(String lastName)
      Sets the user's last name.
      Parameters:
      lastName - String of what to set lastName to.

    • getWeight

      public int getWeight()
      Gets the user's privilege weight.
      Returns:
      weight

    • setWeight

      public void setWeight(int weight)
      Sets the user's privilege weight.
      Parameters:
      weight - int to set weight to.

    • isReviewerApplicant

      public boolean isReviewerApplicant()
      Gets if the applicant has a pending reviewer application.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • setReviewerApplicant

      public void setReviewerApplicant(boolean applicant)
      Sets if the user has a reviewer application pending.
      Parameters:
      applicant - boolean to determine if pending application.

    • getFavorites

      public String[] getFavorites()
      Gets the user's favorite items as an array. Favorites are stored as a comma-separated string in userFavorites.
      Returns:
      String array of favorites; empty array if none.

    • addFavorite

      public void addFavorite(String favorite)
      Adds a favorite item to the user's favorites list. Prevents duplicates and trims whitespace.
      Parameters:
      favorite - The favorite item to add.

    • removeFavorite

      public void removeFavorite(String favorite)
      Removes a favorite item from the user's favorites list.
      Parameters:
      favorite - The favorite item to remove.
